dimensions.name: Focus
dimensions.a: How to write effective prompts, especially system prompts
dimensions.b: Curating and maintaining the entire set of tokens during inference

dimensions.name: Scope
dimensions.a: Discrete task — write good instructions once
dimensions.b: Iterative — curation happens every time you decide what to pass to the model

dimensions.name: Era
dimensions.a: Early LLM use: one-shot classification or text generation
dimensions.b: Agentic era: multi-turn loops over longer time horizons

dimensions.name: What you manage
dimensions.a: Wording, structure, and examples in the prompt
dimensions.b: System prompts + tools + MCP + external data + message history + tool results
